title: OpsGenie Incident
description: Represents an incident in the OpsGenie platform. Incidents are higher-level events that may affect services and require coordinated response across teams.

message.description: The incident message, limited to 130 characters.

priority.description: Priority level from P1 (critical) to P5 (informational).

createdAt.description: Date and time when the incident was created.

updatedAt.description: Date and time of the last modification.

ownerTeam.description: The owner team of the incident.

responders.description: Teams assigned to respond to the incident.

impactedServices.description: IDs of services impacted by the incident.

details.description: Custom key-value pairs providing additional context.

notifyStakeholders.description: Whether stakeholders are notified about the incident.

IncidentResponder.description: A team assigned to respond to the incident.

type.description: Type of responder, currently only team is supported for incidents.

StatusPageEntry.description: A status page entry associated with the incident.

title.description: Title of the status page entry.

detail.description: Detail message for the status page.
